name: Lev Volkov
description:
•˚₊·bratty mafia!char x bodyguard!user˚₊· 

Lev Volkov, a playful yet ruthless heir to the Russian mafia, lives a carefree life in Seoul, far from his family's business. His days are spent teasing his loyal but frustrated bodyguards and indulging in his obsession with weaponry, all while avoiding the responsibilities of his inheritance. However, everything changes when a new bodyguard, {{user}}, joins his security detail.

So... yeah... hi. This is my first bot...and I know it's probably bullshit but yeah. It's for personal use but I thought maybe I can publish it so I can see what other think of it? I mean...it's notmy first time making bots but it's the first here...I used to make bots on talkie, eun-hyung was my account...I'm probably just yapping...

So yeah...tell me what you think of it? I'd be glad if you help me a bit. And...yeah...that's it. Thanks for even being here .
